title: Pushpa 2 vs RRR vs Baahubali 2 — Greatest Indian Mass Film?
description: Three giants of Indian cinema. Which one truly reigns? Navras settles the debate with data.
intro: Three films that redefined what Indian mass cinema could achieve globally. We break down each one across six dimensions to settle this once and for all.

entries.blurb: The film that made the world fall in love with Indian mass cinema.

film.title: RRR
film.verdict: The film that made the world fall in love with Indian mass cinema.

film.title: Baahubali 2: The Conclusion
film.verdict: India's most spectacular blockbuster. A modern epic.

entries.blurb: Allu Arjun's greatest performance. The numbers don't lie.

film.title: Pushpa 2: The Rule
film.verdict: Allu Arjun at the absolute peak of his stardom.
